magic\n00000100 - version 1.0\n00000000 - generator\n37000000 - bound = 55 = 0x37\n00000000 - reserved\n\n**OpCapability 17 (Shader=1):**\n(2<<16)|17 = 0x00020011\n02001100 01000000\n\n**OpExtInstImport 11 (ID=1', 'GLSL.std.450")': 'nString "GLSL.std.450" with null terminator:\nG=0x47', 'word': '2e343530" ✓\n\nAnd I had "2-e-3-4-3-5-3-0 = 2e343530" in my character-by-character listing above', "30='0'\nword": 2, 'terminator': 0, '1': 4, 'L': '4C) -> stored little endian as 32-bit: bytes are [47', 'hex': 'nLet me just use: 0.7f = 0x3F333333\n\nbyte0 = 0x33\nbyte1 = 0x33\nbyte2 = 0x33\nbyte3 = 0x3F\nhex: "3333333f"\n\n0.4f:\n0.4 = 0.0110011001100110011...\n= 1.1001100110011001100110011 × 2^(-2)\nExp = 127 - 2 = 125 = 0x7D\nMantissa: 1001100110011001100110011 -> but wait we need 23 bits after the leading 1:\nSo mantissa = 10011001100110011001101 (rounded)\n\n0.4f as bit pattern:\nSign=0\nExp=0x7D = 01111101\nMantissa = 10011001100110011001101\nFull: 0 01111101 10011001100110011001101\n= 0011 1110 1100 1100 1100 1100 1100 1101\n= 0x3ECCCCCD\n\nbytes (LE): CD CC CC 3E\nhex: "cdcccc3e"\n\n0.2f:\n0.2 = 0.001100110011...\n= 1.10011001100110011001101 × 2^(-3)\nExp = 127 - 3 = 124 = 0x7C\nMantissa: 10011001100110011001101\n\n0.2f: 0 01111100 10011001100110011001101\n= 0011 1110 0100 1100 1100 1100 1100 1101\n= 0x3E4CCCCD\n\nbytes (LE): CD CC 4C 3E\nhex: "cdcc4c3e"\n\n0.75f = 0x3F400000\nbytes: 00 00 40 3F\nhex: "0000403f"\n\n0.5f = 0x3F000000\nbytes: 00 00 00 3F\nhex: "0000003f"\n\n0.25f = 0x3E800000\nbytes: 00 00 80 3E\nhex: "0000803e"\n\n1.0f = 0x3F800000\nbytes: 00 00 80 3F\nhex: "0000803f"\n\n0.0f = 0x00000000\nbytes: 00 00 00 00\nhex: "00000000"\n\nOK', '3': 4, 'So': 'n\nThe string "GLSL.std.450\\0" has bytes: 47 4C 53 4C 2E 73 74 64 2E 34 35 30 00 [pad] [pad] [pad]\nGroups of 4:\n[47 4C 53 4C] -> 32-bit LE word: 0x4C534C47 -> hex string: 4c534c47\n[2E 73 74 64] -> 0x6474732E -> hex string: 6474732e  \n[2E 34 35 30] -> 0x302E3435 wait', 'little-endian': 'the first byte is the LSB.\nSo bytes [2E 34 35 30] as little-endian 32-bit = 0x302E3435... no.\n\nLittle-endian means byte[0] = LSB. OpTypeVector = 23 = 0x17\n- OpTypeMatrix = 24 = 0x18\n- OpTypeStruct = 30 = 0x1E\n- OpTypeBool = 20 = 0x14\n- OpTypeInt = 21 = 0x15\n- OpTypePointer = 32 = 0x20\n- OpTypeFunction = 33 = 0x21\n- OpVariable = 59 = 0x3B\n- OpConstant = 43 = 0x2B\n- OpFunction = 54 = 0x36\n- OpLabel = 248 = 0xF8\n- OpLoad = 61 = 0x3D\n- OpStore = 62 = 0x3E\n- OpReturn = 253 = 0xFD\n- OpFunctionEnd = 56 = 0x38\n- OpCompositeConstruct = 80 = 0x50\n- OpCompositeExtract = 81 = 0x51\n- OpDot = 148 = 0x94\n- OpFMul = 133 = 0x85\n- OpFAdd = 129 = 0x81\n- OpFSub = 131 = 0x83\n- OpExtInst = 12 = 0x0C\n- OpVectorShuffle = 79 = 0x4F\n- OpAccessChain = 65 = 0x41\n- OpFOrdGreaterThan = 186 = 0xBA\n- OpSelect = 169 = 0xA9\n- OpVectorTimesScalar = 142 = 0x8E\n\nNow let me check GLSL.std.450 opcode for Normalize: it's 69", 'FMax': "it's 40.\n\nGLSL.std.450 opcodes:\n- Round = 1\n- RoundEven = 2\n- Trunc = 3\n- FAbs = 4\n- ...\n- FMax = 40\n- ...\n- Length = 66\n- Distance = 67\n- Cross = 68\n- Normalize = 69\n\nYes", 'out': 'n\n**Header:**\n```\n03022307 00000100 00000000 37000000 00000000\n```\n\n**OpCapability Shader:**\n```\n02001100 01000000\n```\nWait: (2<<16)|17 = 0x00020011\nAs bytes (little-endian): 11 00 02 00\nHex string: 11000200\n\nLet me redo: for a 32-bit value V stored little-endian:\nbytes = [V&0xFF', '0x00020011\nbytes': ['0x11', '0x00', '0x02', '0x00'], 'nhex': '11000200"\n\n(6<<16)|11 = 0x0006000B\nbytes: [0x0B', '0x00]\nhex': '4f000800"\n\nSo: 4f000800 05000000 26000000 25000000 25000000 00000000 01000000 02000000\n\nOpFSub id=39', 'carefully)\n\n0.7': 'nfraction = 0.7\n0.7 × 2 = 1.4 -> 1\n0.4 × 2 = 0.8 -> 0\n0.8 × 2 = 1.6 -> 1\n0.6 × 2 = 1.2 -> 1\n0.2 × 2 = 0.4 -> 0\n0.4 × 2 = 0.8 -> 0\n0.8 × 2 = 1.6 -> 1\n0.6 × 2 = 1.2 -> 1\n... repeating: 1011 0011 ...\n\n0.7 = 0.1011001100110011001100110011...\n= 1.011001100110011001100110011 × 2^(-1)\n\nExp = 127 - 1 = 126 = 0x7E\nMantissa bits: 01100110011001100110011 (23 bits', 'concatenate':
